title: Microsoft to obtain opt-in consent, enhance transparency for Windows 10 privacy settings
summary: The complainant expressed his concern to our Office that when he upgraded his computer operating system to Microsoft Windows 10, several privacy settings were set to on by default and that he later found it difficult to understand and change those settings. Our Office therefore investigated whether Microsoft was obtaining valid consent fo...
dedupKey: microsoft to obtain opt in consent enhance transparency for windows 10 privacy settings|2018-06-20
